evidence.description: Muhammad Baqir al-Sadr was the principal founding ideologue of the Islamic Dawa Party, established around 1957–1960. He wrote the party's foundational texts and provided its philosophical grounding, making him its intellectual architect.

editorial_notes: Al-Sadr is the ideological founder of the Dawa Party though he was not the sole organizational founder. He wrote its core texts and provided its philosophical framework.
